channel.title: Knights Concepts RSS
channel.description: Notifications regarding site updates to the Knights Concepts website.

item.title: Hand coded new beginnings
item.description: The start of the new RSS feed! As I've been expanding upon my web developmemt journey, this site has has a few iterations. I appreciate everyone being patient with me whilst I work on everything. The site has moved around a lot in the past, though it should stay as it is now for a little while. Aside from me making improvements and (of course) adding more of my work to it.
